(d) The pointer which was showing West started showing South. Hence, the pointer turned 90° clockwise. Now, Sita went to the direction thinking it as West. The original direction will be +90° clockwise i.e., North direction.

(c) According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows

Now, from the above diagrams, its is clear that South-East will be the direction for West.

(b) According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows

225° clockwise direction
180° anti-clockwise

Clearly, the girl is facing North-East.

(b) If I come from the South, then my left hand denotes West and right hand denotes East and straight is North.

College----Temple----Starting point

Hence, only the remaining direction on the road i.e., the East leads towards the temple.

(c) Time quarter past twelve means that the time is 12 : 15.

Original position [clock showing 12:15]
After shifting [clock showing shifted position]

Hence, when hour hand is pointing towards East, then the minute hand is pointing towards South.
So, the direction opposite to minute hand is North.

So, it is clear that she is now walking towards West.
